# @ramiidv/arca-cdc

> TypeScript SDK for ARCA (formerly AFIP) WSCDC web service - Constatacion de Comprobantes.
> Verifies whether received invoices were actually authorized by ARCA. Validates CAE, CAI, or CAEA codes. Read-only service.

## Install

```bash
npm install @ramiidv/arca-cdc
```

Requires Node.js >= 18. Uses native `fetch` (no axios/node-fetch dependency). ESM only.

## Architecture

The SDK has two API levels:

1. **High-level API** (`ArcaCdc`) - orchestrator that handles WSAA authentication automatically.
2. **Low-level API** (`CdcClient`) - wraps each WSCDC SOAP method directly. Callers provide auth.

Internally:
- `ArcaCdc` (main class) - orchestrator, holds config, exposes all methods
- `WsaaClient` (from `@ramiidv/arca-common`) - handles WSAA authentication, token caching with dedup and expiry margin
- `CdcClient` - wraps all WSCDC SOAP calls using `afipSoapCall` from common
- Error classes from `@ramiidv/arca-common`: `ArcaAuthError`, `ArcaServiceError`, `ArcaSoapError`, `ArcaError`

WSCDC is a .NET/ASMX SOAP service. Namespace: `http://ar.gov.afip.dif.fev1/` (same as WSFE).
WSAA service name: `wscdc`.

## Quick start

```typescript
import fs from "fs";
import { ArcaCdc } from "@ramiidv/arca-cdc";

const cdc = new ArcaCdc({
  cuit: 20123456789,
  cert: fs.readFileSync("./cert.crt", "utf-8"),
  key: fs.readFileSync("./key.key", "utf-8"),
  production: false,
});

const result = await cdc.constatar({
  CbteTipo: 1,
  PtoVta: 1,
  CbteNro: 150,
  CbteFch: "20260315",
  ImpTotal: 12100,
  CodAutorizacion: "73429843294823",
  DocTipoReceptor: 80,
  DocNroReceptor: 30712345678,
});
// result.Resultado: "A" (Aprobado) or "R" (Rechazado)
```

## Configuration

```typescript
new ArcaCdc({
  cuit: number,               // CUIT without hyphens
  cert: string,               // X.509 certificate PEM content
  key: string,                // Private key PEM content
  production?: boolean,       // Default: false (uses homologacion/testing endpoints)
  timeout?: number,           // Default: 30000 (30 seconds). Uses AbortController.
  retries?: number,           // Default: 1. Retries on transient errors (timeout, 5xx).
  retryDelayMs?: number,      // Default: 1000. Exponential backoff: delay * 2^attempt.
  onEvent?: (event: ArcaEvent) => void, // Callback for all SDK events
})
```

## Methods

### constatar(input): Promise<ConstatarResult>

Verify whether a comprobante was authorized by ARCA. Validates CAE, CAI, or CAEA codes.

```typescript
interface ConstatarInput {
  CbteTipo: number;          // Voucher type
  PtoVta: number;            // Point of sale
  CbteNro: number;           // Voucher number
  CbteFch: string;           // Date (YYYYMMDD)
  ImpTotal: number;          // Total amount
  CodAutorizacion: string;   // Authorization code (CAE/CAI/CAEA)
  DocTipoReceptor: number;   // Receiver document type (80=CUIT, 96=DNI, 99=CF)
  DocNroReceptor: number;    // Receiver document number
}

interface ConstatarResult {
  Resultado: "A" | "R";                         // A=Approved, R=Rejected
  Observaciones?: { Code: number; Msg: string }[];  // Rejection details
  Errors?: { Code: number; Msg: string }[];          // Service errors
}
```

### status(): Promise<ServerStatus>

Health check. No auth needed. Returns `{ appserver, dbserver, authserver }`.

### getModalidades(): Promise<ModalidadItem[]>

Query enabled billing modalities. Returns `{ Id, Desc, FchDesde?, FchHasta? }[]`.

### getTiposCbte(): Promise<TipoCbteItem[]>

Query enabled voucher types. Returns `{ Id, Desc, FchDesde?, FchHasta? }[]`.

### getDocTipos(): Promise<DocTipoItem[]>

Query enabled document types. Returns `{ Id, Desc, FchDesde?, FchHasta? }[]`.

### clearAuthCache(): void

Invalidate cached WSAA access tickets.

## Low-level client

Accessible as `cdc.client` and `cdc.wsaa`:

```typescript
const ticket = await cdc.wsaa.getAccessTicket("wscdc");
const auth = { Token: ticket.token, Sign: ticket.sign, Cuit: 20123456789 };
const result = await cdc.client.constatar(auth, input);
await cdc.client.dummy();
await cdc.client.getModalidades(auth);
await cdc.client.getTiposCbte(auth);
await cdc.client.getDocTipos(auth);
```

## Error handling

```typescript
import { ArcaAuthError, ArcaServiceError, ArcaSoapError } from "@ramiidv/arca-cdc";

try {
  await cdc.constatar({ ... });
} catch (e) {
  if (e instanceof ArcaAuthError) {
    // WSAA login failed (bad cert, expired, etc.)
    cdc.clearAuthCache();
  }
  if (e instanceof ArcaServiceError) {
    // ARCA business error with codes
    e.errors; // { code: number, msg: string }[]
  }
  if (e instanceof ArcaSoapError) {
    // HTTP/SOAP transport error (timeout, 500, SOAP fault)
    e.statusCode; // number | undefined
  }
}
```

All error classes extend `ArcaError` which extends `Error`.

## Events

Discriminated union `ArcaEvent`:
- `auth:login` - new token obtained. Fields: `service`, `durationMs`
- `auth:cache-hit` - cached token reused. Fields: `service`
- `request:start` - SOAP call starting. Fields: `method`, `endpoint`
- `request:end` - SOAP call completed. Fields: `method`, `durationMs`
- `request:retry` - retrying after error. Fields: `method`, `attempt`, `error`
- `request:error` - request failed. Fields: `method`, `error`

## Endpoints

| Environment | WSAA | WSCDC |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Testing | `wsaahomo.afip.gov.ar` | `wswhomo.afip.gov.ar/WSCDC/service.asmx` |
| Production | `wsaa.afip.gov.ar` | `servicios1.arca.gob.ar/WSCDC/service.asmx` |

## Constants exported

- `WSCDC_ENDPOINTS` - `{ testing, production }` endpoint URLs
- `WSCDC_NAMESPACE` - `"http://ar.gov.afip.dif.fev1/"` SOAP namespace
- `WSCDC_SERVICE_ID` - `"wscdc"` WSAA service identifier

## Utilities re-exported from common

- `ensureArray<T>(value): T[]` - normalizes single/array SOAP responses
- `parseXml(xml): Record<string, unknown>` - parse XML with CUIT-safe options
- `buildXml(obj): string` - build XML from object
- `checkServiceErrors(result, serviceName): void` - throws ArcaServiceError if errors found
